items.title: Soft Anisotropic Diagrams for Differentiable Image Representation
items.abstract: We introduce Soft Anisotropic Diagrams (SAD), an explicit and differentiable image representation parameterized by a set of adaptive sites in the image plane. In SAD, each site specifies an anisotropi

items.title: From Skill Text to Skill Structure: The Scheduling-Structural-Logical Representation for Agent Skills
